message:
refactor(gui): replace direct smol::Timer and smol::block_on with promise::spawn abstractions

Migrate five GUI modules away from direct smol dependency to the
promise::spawn compatibility layer:

- copy.rs: Replace smol::Timer::after with promise::spawn::sleep
- debug.rs: Replace smol::block_on with promise::spawn::block_on
- keyevent.rs: Replace smol::Timer::at with sleep(duration_since_now)
- termwindow/mod.rs: Replace smol::Timer::at with sleep(duration_since_now)
- render/paint.rs: Replace smol::Timer::at with sleep(duration_since_now)

This is part of the ongoing effort to decouple frankenterm-gui from a
specific async runtime so the asupersync-runtime backend can work
transparently across the GUI layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
